debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x : ℝ
hxge : x ≥ ↑n
hxlt : x < ↑n + 1
⊢ ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), nth Nat.Prime k / (nth Nat.Prime k - 1)) ≤
    ↑(∏ k ∈ Icc 1 (primeCountingReal x), (k + 1) / k)

failed_attempts:
gcongr with k hk
        rw [div_le_div_iff (by norm_cast; omega) (by norm_cast; omega)]
        norm_cast
        have := lt_nth_self infinite k
        omega

gcongr with k hk
        have hp : 2 < nth Nat.Prime k := by
          have : 0 < k := (mem_Icc.mp hk).1
          calc 2 = nth Nat.Prime 0 := Nat.nth_prime_zero.symm
               _ < nth Nat.Prime k := Nat.nth_strictMono Nat.infinite_setOf_prime this
        rw [Nat.div_eq_one_of_le (by omega) (by omega)]
        apply Nat.div_pos <;> omega

gcongr with k hk
        · apply div_nonneg <;> norm_cast <;> omega
        · apply (div_le_div_iff (by norm_cast; omega) (by norm_cast; omega)).mpr
          norm_cast; rw [Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib]; have := Nat.nth_prime_ge k; omega

gcongr with k hk
        apply (div_le_div_iff (by norm_cast; omega) (by norm_cast; omega)).mpr
        norm_cast; have := Nat.nth_prime_gt_n k; ring; omega

apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intros k hk; apply div_nonneg <;> norm_cast <;> omega
        · intros k hk
          have h_le := (Nat.le_succ (k + 1)).trans (Nat.nth_prime_ge k)
          have h_k : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by norm_cast; omega
          have h_p : 0 < (nth Nat.Prime k : ℝ) - 1 := by norm_cast; omega
          rw [le_div_iff h_k, div_mul_eq_mul_div, le_div_iff h_p]
          norm_cast; omega

sub_nonneg.mpr (Nat.cast_le.mpr (prime_nth_prime k).one_lt.le)
        · intro k hk; rw [mem_Icc] at hk; have h1 : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by norm_cast; omega
          have h2 : 0 < (nth Nat.Prime k : ℝ) - 1 := by norm_cast; have := prime_nth_prime k; omega
          rw [div_le_div_iff h2 h1]; norm_cast; have := nth_prime_ge k; omega

norm_cast
        apply Finset.prod_le_prod
        · intros; exact Nat.zero_le _
        · intros k hk
          have : 2 < nth Nat.Prime k :=
            (Nat.Prime.strictMono_nth (by omega)).trans_le' (by rw [Nat.Prime.nth_zero]; rfl)
          rw [Nat.div_eq_one_of_le (Nat.sub_le _ _) (by omega), Nat.div_pos (by omega) (by omega)]

simp [(Nat.Prime.nth_prime k).one_le]))
        intros k hk; rw [mem_Icc] at hk
        have h1 : (0 : ℝ) < k := cast_pos.mpr hk.1
        have h2 : (0 : ℝ) < (nth Nat.Prime k : ℝ) - 1 := by simp [(Nat.Prime.nth_prime k).one_lt]
        rw [div_le_div_iff h2 h1]; norm_cast; rw [add_mul, mul_sub, one_mul]
        linarith [Nat.Prime.nth_strictMono.id_lt (Nat.Prime.nth_prime 0).pos k]

gcongr
        intro k hk
        have h1 := (mem_Icc.1 hk).1
        have h2 := Nat.prime_nth_le k
        rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> (norm_cast; linarith)

gcongr with k hk
        rw [mem_Icc] at hk
        have : k < nth Nat.Prime k := Nat.lt_nth_self Nat.Prime.infinite k
        have : 1 < nth Nat.Prime k := (Nat.nth_mem_of_infinite Nat.Prime.infinite k).one_lt
        norm_cast at *
        rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> linarith

gcongr with k hk
        apply div_le_div_iff.mpr <;> norm_cast <;> nlinarith [Nat.nth_prime_ge_k_plus_two k, (mem_Icc.1 hk).1]

norm_cast
        apply Finset.prod_le_prod <;> intros k hk
        · exact Nat.zero_le _
        · have : 1 ≤ k := (mem_Icc.1 hk).1
          have : 3 ≤ nth Nat.Prime k := (Nat.nth_prime_ge k).trans_le' (by omega)
          rw [Nat.div_eq_one (by omega) (by omega)]
          apply Nat.le_div_of_mul_le (by omega) (by omega)

gcongr with k hk
        · apply div_nonneg <;> norm_cast <;> linarith [Nat.prime_nth_ge k]
        · rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> norm_cast <;> linarith [Nat.prime_nth_ge k, mem_Icc.mp hk]

gcongr with k hk

        · linarith
        · linarith

gcongr with k hk
        apply div_le_div_iff <;> norm_cast <;> linarith [Nat.nth_prime_ge k, (mem_Icc.1 hk).1]

apply Nat.cast_le.mpr

        rw [Nat.div_eq_one (by omega) (by omega)]
        exact Nat.one_le_div_iff.mpr (by omega)

norm_cast

        · apply div_nonneg <;> norm_cast <;> linarith [(nth_prime k).pos]
        · rw [div_le_div_iff] <;> norm_cast <;> linarith [prime_nth_ge k, (nth_prime k).one_lt, (mem_Icc.mp hk).1]

gcongr with k hk

gcongr with k hk
        have : k + 1 ≤ nth Nat.Prime k := Nat.lt_nth_prime k
